creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Sergey, to be honest I wasn able to reproduce any minutes deformation on 
-current. But I think it safe to commit if it resolves the problem for 
anybody. But would you please _attach_ unified diff to this pr. If I 
just copy/paste it from pr, put some space, then it didn't apply 
cleanly. Just attach the patch file to your response email, do not copy 
it contents into the message body. Thank you.
